{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Launched by a well-known luxury brand. Wearing it will give you a sense of nobility and sophistication. Even though nothing else has changed!
|affct=FAME
|hard=DEF
|source=Divine Order Chest (0.4%)
|color=blue
|earth=5
|water=3
|fire=4
|wind=2
|form=Zombie
|element=Water
|realm=Kemet
|orangehard=ATK
}}
